titleStmt.title: SII 37.442: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 442. (A.R. No. E 54 of 1941-42.) Vāḍapalli, Suryapet Taluk, Nalgonda District.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1541, Siddhārthi, Bhādrapada, śu. 2, Monday corresponding to 1619 A.D., August 30, Monday, f.d.t. 04.

It records the visit of Vēṅkaṭa Bhaṭṭarāchārya, son of Parāśara Bhaṭṭa, to the temple of Naraśiṁhasvāmi and the provision made by him for conducting proper worship in the temple as at Śrīraṅgam and Tirupati.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatē rāmānujāyanamaḥ . svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakavatsarāḥ 1541 Agunēṭi śiddhā¨rtti nāma saṁvva
tsara bhādrapada śu 2 sō . pramāṇa nakha ni¨rbhiṁnnavāḍi matte
bhamastakaḥ . rājatē nigamān ga¨rjjan śrī parāśarakēsari . śrīma
dvēdamā¨rgga pratiṣṭhāpanācāryulayina vubhaya vēdāṁttācā
ryulayina śrīparāśarabhaṭṭaru komāra veṁkkaṭa bhaṭṭarācāryu
la Ayyavāru vōḍapalliki vēṁcceśi śrī lakṣmīnṛśiṁhvu
lanu śēviṁcci kriṣṇātīraṁ mahāsthaḷaṁ ganaka tī¨rtthaprasādālu
vijjīviṁcci śrīraṁggamu tirupati divyadēśālalōnu yē ma
ryādā naḍucunō Āmaryādanu Abhimāniṁccināmu
yī mariyādanu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu peddalallā
nu Abhimāniṁccina naḍipiṁccagaṭṭaḍacēśināramu .
Digital edition of SII 37.442 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
